content.en:
Bang!!!!

The Great Array of the Heavenly Emperor Palace was easily torn apart by the Domain Ancestors, and then began to intercept those people in the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Most of the people were intercepted, and only a few inconsequential people escaped.

In fact, it was these domain ancestors who were too lazy to chase after them, because it was enough to capture some important people.

Except for the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, none of the other half-step domain ancestors could escape, and all of them were intercepted.

"Where is the Ancestor of the Great Sea?"

The Heavenly Demon Domain Ancestor interrogated one of the palace masters.

"I don't know!"

The palace master responded.

Under the repeated inquiries of many domain ancestors, these palace masters answered that they did not know.

As a result, these Domain Ancestors began to torture these half-step Domain Ancestors with cruel means, and in the end, some of these Half-Step Domain Ancestors couldn't help it.

"We really don't know, only the two palace masters, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, know. Moreover, the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor forcibly searched the souls of the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master at the beginning, and the Ten Thousand Methods Dao Ancestor should also know about it!"

A palace master confessed.

"Dragon Shadow Palace Master and Thunder Tribulation Palace Master!"

Many domain ancestors wrinkled.

Because these two guys only have their clones in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and their bodies are not there.

Don't think about it, it must be in the War Tower.

Once the two of them don't come out, they can't arrest these two.

They are all domain ancestors, and when they enter the War Boundary Tower, they are also the domain ancestor area they enter.

Moreover, the Battle Boundary Tower can't fight anywhere except for the Battle Table, and besides, it's useless to kill people there.

Therefore, as long as the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master did not come out, they would have nothing to do with these two people.

"If the propaganda is out, if the Vast Sea Ancestor doesn't come out, we will kill the people of the Heavenly Emperor Palace! Moreover, his son, the White Tiger Palace Master, will definitely die!"

The Five Top Domain Ancestors ordered.

Suddenly, the domain ancestors under their command spread the news, which immediately caused the shock of countless forces in the entire Xuanxu Taboo Realm.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace, once upon a time, was the number one force in the Xuanxuan Forbidden Realm.

Now, it hasn't been long before it has fallen to the point of imminent destruction.

It's all changing so fast!

......

The human world.

Ouyang Jiu'er begged Ye Tian again, because the True Martial Palace Master was arrested.

If you don't save it, then the True Martial Palace Master is afraid that he will die.

Ye Tian agreed, so he only sent an incarnation to the ruins of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Those domain ancestors still stayed here and didn't leave.

When Ye Tian descended, it attracted the attention of many domain ancestors.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor!"

The Red Dragon Domain Ancestor and the other five top domain ancestors were a little wary of Ye Tian's arrival, even if it was only an incarnation that came, they were afraid that Ye Tian would make any moves, so they all made preparations for battle.

"I'm not here to fight, I'm just here to ask for someone!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Who does the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor want?" asked the Red Dragon Domain Ancestor.

"True Martial Palace Master!"

Ye Tian said.

"What does the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor want the True Martial Palace Master to do?" the Heavenly Demon Domain Ancestor was curious, but did not immediately agree.

"The master of the True Martial Palace is my friend Ouyang Jiu'er's subordinate, he has been undercover in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, his status in the Heavenly Emperor Palace has no status in the heart of the Vast Sea Ancestor, hand him over to me, otherwise I will interfere in the matter of the Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

Ye Tian threatened.

"You ......"

Many domain ancestors were very angry, but they were suppressed by the five top domain ancestors.

"Okay, the True Martial Domain Ancestor will give it to you!"

The Red Dragon Domain Ancestor discussed with the other four top Domain Ancestors and decided.

For the time being, they are still in a cooperative relationship, and their opinions must be unified, otherwise the cooperation will not succeed, and if they compete with each other, it will be chaotic.

They didn't want Ye Tian to get involved, Ye Tian knew about the existence of the Haohai Sea Ancestor, but he didn't look for the Haohai Sea Ancestor, maybe he didn't have any interest in that mysterious treasure.

In case because of the time of the True Martial Palace Master, he has one more competitor, it is not a good thing.

--------------------

"True Martial Palace Master, you traitor, I want you to be Ouyang Jiu'er's subordinate, no wonder a lot of information from our Heavenly Emperor Palace will be leaked for no reason!"

The other palace masters also glared at the true martial palace master.

But the True Martial Palace Master didn't care, now that it was exposed, he didn't need to stay in the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

These domain ancestors released the True Martial Palace Master, and Ye Tian left with the True Martial Palace Master.

"Thank you Wanfa Dao Ancestor!"

The True Martial Palace Lord said gratefully.

"Don't thank me, if you want to thank Ouyang Jiu'er, he asked me to save you!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Subsequently, Ye Tian returned to the human realm with the True Martial Palace Master.

For the time being, the True Martial Palace Master has nowhere to go, so he can only live in the human realm for the time being.

With the passage of time, the vast sea ancestors never appeared, causing those domain ancestors to be very angry, killing one by one half-step domain ancestors and a large number of Dao ancestors.

......

Void Sacred Tree Space.

The Vast Sea Ancestor had already received a summons from the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, but he didn't dare to go out!

Once he goes out, does the Void Holy Fruit still have anything to do with him?

Even, his life may not be assured!

Therefore, when he learned that many half-step domain ancestors and Dao ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace had been arrested, he was indifferent.

Even his own son, the White Tiger Palace Master, was worried about his life, and he endured it.

For a person like him who pursues strength, it's just a big deal to have some sons in the future.

He can sacrifice everything for the sake of a higher realm.

"Red Dragon Domain Ancestor, Heavenly Demon Domain Ancestor, Ten Thousand Blade Domain Ancestor, Arctic Domain Ancestor, Shakya Domain Ancestor, when I refine the Void Holy Fruit and raise my strength to the level of the strongest Domain Ancestor in the future, you will all have to die one by one!"

Hao Hai Ancestor swore an oath.

Soon after.

Seeing that the Vast Sea Ancestors really wouldn't appear, the Red Dragon Domain Ancestors directly killed all the people in the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

After all, they have already been offended, and it is useless to keep these people, why not kill and keep them?

Moreover, some domain ancestors specially guarded outside the Battle Realm Tower, waiting for the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master to come out.

It's a pity that the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master are not stupid and can't come out.

In the blink of an eye, another four million years have passed.

this day.

The Vast Sea Ancestor was very excited, because the Void Holy Fruit would be completely ripe in a few hundred years.

"Hahaha, the other domain ancestors are still looking for me, they don't know about the Void Holy Fruit at all, and when I refine the Void Holy Fruit, they are afraid that they will only perceive the breath of the Void Holy Tree, and it will be too late at that time!"

The Vast Sea Ancestor waited patiently, not daring to stop for a moment.

At the same time, Ye Tian used the Spatial Sacred Technique to slash and perceive the Void Sacred Tree.

Rumble!!!!

The aura of the Void Sacred Tree was sensed by Ye Tian, and he even sensed a piece of space.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian became excited.
